case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA VS. ROBBIE GARRETT et al

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robbie Garret is present.
Attorney Constance Choi representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marti Bassi, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAY-29-2012 is vacated.
